name: Jordan Marks
subject: [MATCH] - "troublesome"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---

**" Toomey's stance on Justice Scalia's replacement could be
troublesome for his reelection bid"** _\- Philadelphia Inquirer (June 13, 2016)_

Friends: Pat Toomey is still refusing to do his job -- and people are mad about it. [**Are you?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2404825568546652160/-6125435353433112576?refcode=e20160615&refcode2=e20160615nda&amount=25)

It's been a full **_91 days_** since Judge Merrick Garland was nominated to the Supreme Court, but Toomey _still_ won't support a Supreme Court confirmation vote.

**Our mid-June fundraising deadline is fast approaching,** and we're counting on your help to END Pat Toomey's hyper-partisan obstruction and take back our Senate majority.

[**Every gift before tomorrow 's midnight deadline will be DOUBLED to help elect Katie and take back the Senate. Chip in $5 now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2404825568546652160/-6125435353433112576?refcode=e20160615&refcode2=e20160615nda&amount=25)

Katie had spent her entire career creating jobs, protecting our natural resources, and serving the public -- she knows what it means to do your job, and do it well. Let's show Pat Toomey we won't stand for anything less.

[**Donate before the deadline to double your gift.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2404825568546652160/-6125435353433112576?refcode=e20160615&refcode2=e20160615nda&amount=25)

Thanks,

Jordan Marks
Campaign Manager

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.

**Chip in $5 before the deadline to double your gift. Thank you.**

**[Donate now](https://act.myngp.com/el/2404825568546652160/-6125435353433112576?refcode=e20160615&refcode2=e20160615nda&amount=25 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2404825568546652160/-6197492947471040512).

name: Team Gregg
subject: What they're saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Hoosiers can't stop raving about John Gregg and Christina Hale's jobs and economic growth plan.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8244647910869174272/-5533657803773310976?utm_campaign=acq_ecodv2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160615acqecodv2gqfultg&refcode=em16160615acqecodv2gqfultg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Hoosiers can't stop raving about John Gregg and Christina Hale's jobs and economic growth plan:
> **_" John Gregg is presenting a bold vision."_**
> \- Suraj Patel, President, Sun Group of Companies
>
> **_" This plan is spot on. The Gregg/Hale plan is forward-thinking, strategic and well thought out." _**
> \- David Becker, President, First Internet Bank
>
> **_" John Gregg has proposed a plan that will work."_**
> \- Ben Evans, Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder, OurHealth
>
> **_" The Gregg/Hale Plan has correctly diagnosed Indiana's economic ills and will breathe new life into our state."_**
> \- Woodrow A. Myers Jr., MD, MBA, Managing Director, Myers Ventures LLC
>
> **_" Gregg is emerging as a candidate with stronger message and vision. It's starting to look like those who fear Indiana's government has lost its way in recent years might have a reason to be excited."_**
> \- Matthew Tully, Indianapolis Star Political Columnist
Are you ready to join John Gregg and Christina Hale in rebuilding Indiana's economy? **[Find out more about the Gregg/Hale Economic Growth Plan and tell Indiana leaders it's time to put working families ahead of politics.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8244647910869174272/-5533657803773310976?utm_campaign=acq_ecodv2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160615acqecodv2gqfultg&refcode=em16160615acqecodv2gqfultg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your support, Team Gregg

name: Megan Jacobs, Team Cooper
subject: Wanna get away with Air McCrory?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Governor McCrory is wasting your money -- again.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202110/2fde7c66/403348eb/156a1d75/515264352/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIifQ==/ "http://www.airmccrory.com?utm_campaign=adv_airmc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160610_adv_gq_airmc_ful__mj&firstname=&lastname=")
---
Friend, Governor McCrory is wasting your money on his latest venture: Air McCrory. A recent WBTV investigation revealed that he has made over 100 unnecessary flights, costing taxpayers more than $60,000. He frequently uses state planes to get out of town, even taking trips that include campaign fundraisers. It doesn't stop there. His office actually changed internal procedures to make their flight records less transparent. He's hiding this information because he knows that this is unacceptable. **[Check out the Air McCrory website to find out more about Governor McCrory's latest way to waste taxpayer money.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202110/2fde7c66/403348eb/156a1d75/515264352/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIifQ==/ "http://www.airmccrory.com?utm_campaign=adv_airmc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160610_adv_gq_airmc_ful__mj&firstname=&lastname=")** I can think of a lot of ways to spend that money better and actually help people across the state. McCrory's budget slashing has crippled our education system, but he still thought it would be okay to waste this money on unnecessary and personal travel. We need a leader that doesn't take advantage of his office and stick hard-working North Carolinians with the bill. | | [**Get away with Air McCrory ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202110/2fde7c66/403348eb/156a1d75/515264352/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIifQ==/ "http://www.airmccrory.com?utm_campaign=adv_airmc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160610_adv_gq_airmc_ful__mj&firstname=&lastname=")
---
Thanks,
Megan Jacobs
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Going fast [Obama tickets]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
RSVP to see President Obama. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTA2MzM2MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxNDgzMTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Dear Friend -- I'm thrilled President Obama is coming to Seattle on Friday, June 24th to support my campaign. There are still a few tickets available, but I have to tell you: They're going fast! [**RSVP today and claim your spot at this historic event.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTA2MzM2MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxNDgzMTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) I'm so excited to have President Obama as our dinner's guest of honor because I know we share a vision for our country, one that has compassion and equality at its core. We're going to have a great time at dinner on the 24th during what could be President Obama's last trip to Seattle. I know a lot of your friends and neighbors will be joining us -- I hope you can, too! [**Chip in to our campaign and claim your ticket right away.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTA2MzM2MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxNDgzMTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**RSVP »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTA2MzM2MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxNDgzMTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Phil Needs Your Help
body:
| | | Support Phil's Campaign Today!
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9ef8b8fd30&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| Our democratic opponents have proven their ability to raise sizable funds and our primary opponent’s Wall Street payout makes his fundraising amount irrelevant. Today, one of our opponents reported over $700,000 in campaign contributions. More than 52% of those contributions are from out of state, including Washington D.C., NYC and California! This is where our campaign differs; we are running a campaign powered by Vermonters.

This campaign is about building a stronger economy by focusing on the fundamental costs that families and businesses face. Tax, education and healthcare reform coupled with a predictable political environment is the best way to make Vermont more affordable.

Vermonters are eager for change and I know Phil is just as eager, but he needs your help!

**[Can you donate $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 today? ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a2bad76a16&e=19cebfe173)**

We are going to need every penny we can raise to compete and share our positive vision with voters around the state.

**[With your financial support I know Phil can win this election and get Vermont back on track! ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dcbebe3290&e=19cebfe173)**

We are all very grateful for your support, especially Phil!

Thank you,

Brittney Wilson
Phil Scott for Vermont
---

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: The future of our movement
body:
#
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends,
We are at a critical moment for the future of the Democratic Party and our country. Last night marked the last primary as part of the Democratic nomination process, and we know that our campaign will enter the convention in Philadelphia with more than 1800 delegates.
Our movement has fought against steep odds when so many people counted us out. Together we built a political revolution that fought in every one of more than 50 primaries and caucuses since February. Our delegates from this movement will be the people who vote on the platform of the Democratic Party, and who will have influence on not just who the nominee is this election, but how the next nominee will be elected, too.
The future of our political revolution depends on you. That's why Bernie Sanders will host a live, online video address this Thursday night at 8:30 p.m. EDT / 5:30 p.m. PDT. Will you join Bernie?
[**Sign up to RSVP to watch Bernie Sanders' live, online video message on Thursday night and we 'll send you a text message or email shortly before the event begins.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160615 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160615")
**[RSVP TO JOIN»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160615 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160615")**
Our political revolution is not just about what happens in Philadelphia, or even at the election in November, during which we must stop Donald Trump from becoming president. In order for the work that we have begun to be long-lasting for years to come, we must continue our political revolution. And we need you to be a part of it.
We'll see you Thursday night.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Tom Russell, RussFeingold.com
subject: BREAKING: New polling
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Take a look at these polling results. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema")
Friend -- Today's Marquette University poll showed us two really important things: First, we're building real momentum by listening to Wisconsinites in all 72 counties, _but second, this will still be a very close race._ The Koch brothers see these new numbers, too. Their network has already spent over $3 million on their "model legislator," Senator Ron Johnson, and we know it'll be funneling even more into ads attacking Russ. **[We need to respond to these right-wing attacks on Russ. Will you contribute $5 right now so we have the resources necessary to fight back?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816b/4267383589/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/3568168/4267383589/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/3568169/4267383589/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")

---
Today's poll shows that all of our -- and your -- work is paying off. But with Donald Trump and Senator Johnson on the ballot, we know what's at stake. We can't take our foot off the gas pedal, even for a second.
**[Will you contribute $5 today -- so that we'll be able to continue to build the grassroots organization we need to win in November, and be ready for the right-wing attacks on Russ?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema")**
We've known this from the start -- this WILL be a close election, and we know that the candidate with the most grassroots support will come out on top.
With your support, that candidate is going to be Russ.
Thanks,
Tom Russell
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf433c/1c469400/6f7a7c5/356816a/4267383589/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-marquette-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&refcode=ema_2016-06-15_marquette-poll_nd-t&utm_campaign=marquette-poll&utm_medium=ema")

Their network has already spent over $3 million on their "model legislator," Senator Ron Johnson, and we know it'll be funneling even more into ads attacking Russ. name: Brian Zuzenak, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Hi -- are you ready to step up in Virginia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Hi! I'm Brian, your Virginia State Director. I wanted to introduce myself and make sure you knew how to get involved in our team here in Virginia.

Real quick, here are the facts you need to know as we start working toward November 8th:
> * Virginia is going to make a huge difference in this election. This contest WILL be close -- we need to make sure we get at least 270 electoral votes, the number Hillary needs to win to break the highest and hardest glass ceiling
> * The sooner you get involved, the bigger the impact you can have on this campaign
> * This is perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetime and not one person -- not ONE -- can afford to sit this out unless we want to put everything we’ve worked for at risk
>

Between now and Election Day, you can expect to hear from me when there are upcoming events you might be interested in, important voting reminders, when Trump needs to be held accountable in Virginia, and when this organization needs your help.

**That starts right now -- will you be a volunteer in Virginia? Sign up today and your local organizer will reach out with information about all of the different ways you can get involved:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=2&rj=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&rt=0)
Thanks,

Brian

Brian Zuzenak
Virginia State Director
Hillary for America

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=36&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU3NDk5MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMzYwNzYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
